title: Lesson-Bound Tutoring Acts And Scoped Prompt Assembly
rationale: Phase 2 needs tutoring responses, but only as bounded acts derived from the active lesson state and one-child projection. This bead introduces tutoring primitives without opening an unrestricted chat surface.
focus_hint: Keep the act vocabulary narrow: explain, ask-check, encourage, clarify-next-step. Assemble prompts only from active lesson state, child-scoped projection, and policy guardrails.
acceptance_criteria: Tutoring act builder accepts only validated session and active lesson playback context
Prompt assembly excludes cross-child data and refuses lesson-free prompts
Tutoring acts are enumerated and bounded rather than free-form arbitrary generations
Responses carry enough metadata for guardian review and later safety audit
